description_long: This is a modern, two-story house enclosed by a tan perimeter wall, featuring a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The front yard includes a paved driveway with three parked cars, a small green lawn, and a patio area with a round table and chairs shaded by a large umbrella. Lush landscaping is present, with two prominent flowering bushes adding vibrant color to the yard. The house facade combines white plaster and stonework, with large windows and a glass block accent wall near the entrance. The main entryway is recessed, with a set of steps leading to a glass door beneath a covered porch. The rear of the house includes a secondary entrance and an external staircase leading to the upper floor.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, stone and white plaster facade, landscaped front yard, and a driveway with parked cars. Features include large windows, a glass block wall, and a covered entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway with three cars, landscaped yard with flowering bushes, patio set, and the main entryway with glass block wall.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, the tan perimeter wall, and the dense landscaping with two large bushes obscuring part of the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat roof, upper floor windows, external staircase, and a secondary entrance with a white gate.
description_view_3: Direct front view focusing on the driveway, three cars, patio area, and the main entrance with steps and a covered porch.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass block accent
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entry with glass door, steps, covered porch, and glass block wall accent
